cookies.title: We use cookies
cookies.description: This site uses cookies to improve your experience. By continuing to browse, you agree to the use of cookies.
cookies.necessaryDescription: Required for the basic operation of the site, sign-in, and security.
cookies.analyticsDescription: They help us understand how visitors use the site. Data is anonymized.
cookies.marketingDescription: They allow us to show relevant ads on other sites.

about.title: About Us
about.subtitle: Premium platform for buying and selling cars in Slovakia
about.missionText: Autobazar123 was created with one clear goal – to bring transparency, security, and a premium experience to the Slovak used car market. We believe that buying or selling a car should be a simple, fast, and pleasant process.
about.transparencyDesc: Every listing contains verified vehicle information, including history and technical condition.
about.securityDesc: Verified sellers, secure payments via Stripe, and personal data protection.
about.speedDesc: Listing online in less than a minute. No waiting for approval.
about.teamText: Behind Autobazar123 stands a team of experienced professionals from the automotive and technology industries. We combine years of experience with modern technology to bring you the best possible experience.
about.dontHesitate: Don't hesitate to contact us. We're happy to help.
about.passwordResetEmailHint: After entering a new password, we will send a 6-digit verification code to your email.
about.passwordResetEmailSent: Verification code was sent to your email
about.passwordResetEmailFailed: Failed to send password reset email
